name: trap-percentage-of-total
description: Trap: percentage-of-total requires normalization the system doesn't support
messages: Show each region's revenue as a percentage of total revenue
rubric: The system has no built-in normalize/percentage transform. Options: (a) Use a pie/arc chart which inherently shows proportions — this is the cleanest solution. (b) Attempt a bar chart but note percentage labels require computation the system doesn't support. FAIL if model outputs raw revenue values and claims they are percentages. FAIL if model fabricates a percentage column that doesn't exist. BEST: arc/pie chart that naturally shows part-of-whole.
